classes.reasoning: Document explicitly self-identifies as 'DEVELOPMENT SAFETY UPDATE REPORT (DSUR)' in the title and throughout. Header states 'DSUR Number: 3 (Third Annual DSUR)' and footer states 'CONFIDENTIAL — REGULATORY SUBMISSION DOCUMENT'. Prepared in accordance with ICH E2F Guideline on Development Safety Update Reports.

indication: EGFR-mutant advanced NSCLC following progression on osimertinib
summary: This is the third annual Development Safety Update Report (DSUR) for investigational drug BRC-471 (Lumitanib), covering the reporting period 01 March 2023 to 28 February 2024. The report summarizes worldwide safety findings, patient exposure, serious adverse events, regulatory actions, and benefit-risk evaluation for an oral dual EGFR/HER2 TKI under development for EGFR-mutant advanced NSCLC following osimertinib progression.
references_to: ICH E2F Guideline on Development Safety Update Reports
Appendix 1: Line listing of all SAEs during the reporting period
Appendix 5: IB Edition 2 summary of changes
